header.name: Return By Death - Behavior Pack
header.description: Re:Zero-inspired Return By Death mechanic for Bedrock Edition (including Pocket Edition). v1.2.1 PATCH: Fixed Bedrock chat commands - now works via 3 layers (CustomCommandRegistry for 1.21.80+, chatSend fallback, RBD Notebook item UI menu). Added Tier 1 RBD flavor: witch scent particles, Subaru death quotes, heartbeat at low HP, witch watching message every 5th death.
